data.title: White House economic adviser Hassett: The Fed will decide its policy direction on interest rates
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: White House economic adviser Hassett said that the Federal Reserve will decide its policy orientation on interest rates. US President Trump hopes to achieve fair and reciprocal trade, and he will take this into consideration when deciding whether to accept proposals from various countries. (Jinshi)

data.title: Circle Expands USDC Issuance on Solana Network
data.description: According to Foresight News, Onchain Lens reports that Circle has issued an additional 250 million USDC on the Solana network. This brings Circle's total USDC issuance on Solana to 12 billion for the year 2025.

data.title: David Sacks, White House encryption and AI director: Black Monday is over
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News David Sacks, the White House encryption and AI director, posted on the X platform that the Black Monday "prank" is over.
The market shows that US stocks continued to rise, with the Nasdaq's gains expanding to 4%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average up 3.6%, and the S&P 500 up 3.7%.

data.title: Cboe BZX Proposes Rule Change for Canary SUI ETF Listing
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Cboe BZX Exchange, part of the Chicago Board Options Exchange Group, has submitted a proposed rule change to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This proposal, filed under the 19b-4 application, seeks approval for the listing and trading of the Canary SUI ETF. The submission marks a step forward in expanding the range of exchange-traded funds available on the market.

data.title: White House Prioritizes Japan and South Korea in Tariff Talks
data.description: According to BlockBeats, White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett stated that Japan and South Korea are being prioritized in ongoing tariff negotiations.

data.title: Apollo Invests in RWA Platform Plume Following Recent Funding Round
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, asset management firm Apollo has made a strategic investment in the RWA platform Plume, amounting to approximately seven figures. The exact amount remains undisclosed by the Plume team. This investment follows Plume's announcement of a $20 million Series A funding round late last year.

Plume co-founder Teddy Pornprinya stated that the mainnet is scheduled to launch this quarter. The Plume team has been working closely with Apollo to develop ACRED, a service provided in collaboration with Securitize. This marks Apollo's first investment in a specific RWA chain.

data.title: Ethereum Whale Sells Holdings After Over 900 Days
data.description:
According to PANews, a significant Ethereum holder has decided to liquidate their assets after holding them for more than 900 days. The whale sold all 10,000 ETH, valued at $15.71 million, today.

The investor initially acquired the Ethereum holdings on October 4 and November 14, 2022, at an average price of $1,295 per ETH, totaling $12.95 million. Despite Ethereum's price surpassing $4,000, the whale did not sell at that peak. Today, the decision to exit resulted in a profit of $2.75 million, although selling at the peak could have yielded a profit of $27.6 million.

data.title: CBOE Submits SUI ETF Application to SEC
data.description: According to Odaily, the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE) has submitted a 19b-4 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for the SUI ETF application on behalf of Canary.

data.title: Revolut Fined €3.5 Million in Lithuania for Money Laundering Failures
data.description: According to Odaily, British fintech company Revolut has been fined €3.5 million in Lithuania due to failures in its money laundering controls. Lithuanian regulators imposed the maximum penalty on Revolut, citing "violations and deficiencies" in the company's processes.

data.title: RedStone Launches ‘Bolt’ Oracle on Ethereum Scaling Solution MegaETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Oracle development team RedStone has become the latest project deployed on Ethereum Layer 2 network MegaETH. Its innovative architecture breaks the limitations of traditional Rollup solutions. This cooperation coincides with the launch of MegaETH public testnet, which is the final preparation stage before the launch of the network's mainnet. RedStone co-founder Marcin Kazmierczak said that the Bolt system will provide "plug and play" functions and be compatible with the traditional push data architecture of mainstream DeFi protocols such as Compound and Aave. (The Block)
